[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000010010 2
1 1011000000 3
2 0000000001 1
3 0001000001 2
4 0000010010 2
5 1011000000 3
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

01 10 0101100001 4
12 21 0100000011 3
23 32 0000000010 1
34 43 1010000010 3
45 54 0010000001 2
56 65 0011000000 2
67 76 0011010000 3
70 07 0001000000 1

02 20 0100000001 2
13 31 0001000010 2
24 42 0000000011 2
35 53 0011000000 2
46 64 0010001010 3
57 75 0011000000 2
60 06 0001000000 1
71 17 0001000000 1

03 30 0001000000 1
14 41 0000001111 4
25 52 0000000001 1 match 2
36 63 0011000010 3
47 74 1010000000 2
50 05 0001000001 2 match 3
61 16 0001001010 3
72 27 0000010000 1

04 40 0000000001 1 match 2
15 51 0001000001 2 match 3
26 62 0000010010 2 match 0 4
37 73 1011000000 3 match 1 5
[completion]

1 37 73
